---
title: "Tools & Apps"
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="web-projects-grid">

  <a class="web-project-card" href="https://robertslab.github.io/current-findings/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="/img/web-projects/current-findings.png" alt="Current Findings">
    <div class="web-project-name">Current Findings</div>
  </a>

  <a class="web-project-card" href="https://robertslab.github.io/pubathon-2026/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="/img/web-projects/pubathon-2026.png" alt="Pub-a-thon 2026">
    <div class="web-project-name">Pub-a-thon 2026</div>
  </a>

  <a class="web-project-card" href="https://urol-e5.github.io/deep-dive-genome-browser/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="/img/web-projects/dive.png" alt="DIVE">
    <div class="web-project-name">DIVE</div>
  </a>

  <a class="web-project-card" href="https://oystergen.es" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="/img/web-projects/ocean.png" alt="OCEAN">
    <div class="web-project-name">OCEAN</div>
  </a>

  <a class="web-project-card" href="https://urol-e5.github.io/MOSAiC/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="/img/web-projects/mosaic.png" alt="MOSAiC">
    <div class="web-project-name">MOSAiC</div>
  </a>

  <a class="web-project-card" href="https://github.com/sr320/public-omics-watchtower" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="/img/web-projects/public-omics-watchtower.png" alt="Public Omics Watchtower">
    <div class="web-project-name">Public Omics Watchtower</div>
  </a>

</div>
```
